name: wildlife_trade_enforcement_vendor_patch_mesa_tru_loy
premise: A Wildlife Trade Enforcement response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving wildlife trade enforcement vendor patch mesa tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Keisha Dubois
agents.identity: I am Keisha Dubois, accountable for a defensible call in Wildlife Trade Enforcement when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Jonah Kim
agents.identity: I am Jonah Kim, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Wildlife Trade Enforcement.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Keisha Dubois must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Keisha Dubois do?
